data.name: Hentai Clicker: Yumi is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Yumi is streaming

Step into the wild, electrifying world of Yumi, the punk girl who turns up the volume and turns you on at the same time.
With neon streaks in her hair, a wicked smile, and a love for loud rock riffs, Yumi reacts to your every click like it’s a beat she can’t resist.

She moans to the rhythm, teases with attitude, and pushes boundaries with every new outfit you unlock.
She’s bold, filthy, rebellious—and she wants you to play her like your favorite guitar. 🎸🔥

🎵 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Yumi is streaming blends addictive clicker gameplay with the raw, untamed energy of punk culture.
Every tap cranks up her arousal like turning up an amp.
Collect hearts to unlock wild outfits, explicit animations, and dirty voice lines filled with rock-fueled desire.

From torn fishnets to leather tops, from teasing poses to hardcore scenes, Yumi will take you on a head-banging erotic ride.

🔞 NSFW Scenes

Experience uncensored, fully animated NSFW sequences where Yumi mixes lust with pure rock attitude.
She moves, moans, and grinds to the beat—proving that punk girls do everything harder, louder, and dirtier.

🎉 Features

🎸 Punk Rock Waifu – Spiked accessories, tattoos, and a rebellious charm.
🎨 High-Energy Anime Art – Fast, bold, expressive visuals.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Simple, satisfying, impossible to quit.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – Fishnets, leather, chokers, and wild punk gear.
🔊 Lewd Voice Acting – Dirty moans mixed with rock-style attitude.
🚀 Progression System – Collect hearts, level up, and unlock her craziest fantasies.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you love naughty girls with attitude, heavy bass, and zero shame,
Yumi is your perfect punk fantasy.
Hot, loud, and uncontrollable—she’ll make you her favorite backstage playmate. 😈🔥

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap amps her up.
🔓 Unlock Scenes – Use hearts to reveal steamy outfits and explicit interactions.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Boost your pace and rock harder.

🎉 Turn Up the Heat!

She’s streaming live.
The music is loud.
And Yumi is ready to give you a private show that’s hotter than any concert.

Jump into Hentai Clicker: Yumi is streaming and let the punk chaos begin! 🎸💋🔥

data.short_description: 🎸 Get wild with Hentai Clicker: Yumi is streaming! 😈🔥 Click to collect ❤️, unlock punk outfits, and enjoy explicit scenes with the hottest rock-loving rebel!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
